steps.title: Identify what ears do when sounds reach them
steps.content: The key clue is “his ears could not help receiving the words which were borne to him through the open window.” His ears involuntarily perceive words (sounds) that travel through space. This defines what 'receiving' means: the action ears perform when sound reaches them.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the correct answer
steps.content: Hearing is what ears do when sound reaches them involuntarily—that's what 'receiving' expresses here. The other three don't fit: denying contradicts the context, and entering and carrying describe the words' movement, not what the ear does. D is correct.
